Our Purpose

More than a network —
a movement

WOMB Circle brings together eminent women directors, Independent Directors, CXOs, founders and governance professionals in a trusted peer ecosystem defined by collaboration, integrity and shared purpose.

We don't just celebrate women in boardrooms — we create the pathways that lead them there, and keep them influential once they arrive.

Our Vision

To build one of India's most influential and trusted communities of women board leaders and decision-makers.

Our Mission

To strengthen relationships, governance dialogue, visibility and collaboration among accomplished women professionals.

Why WOMB Circle

Six reasons to belong

♢

Strategic Peer Network

Connect with an influential ecosystem of accomplished women board leaders and governance professionals.

◎

Meaningful Connections

Build lasting professional relationships with senior leaders across diverse industries and sectors.

◆

Leadership Visibility

Participate in prestigious engagements and initiatives that amplify your voice and board candidacy.

◉

Governance Insights

Access contemporary governance, ESG and strategy conversations, plus sharp industry intelligence.

⬣

Exclusive Events

Attend curated conclaves, industrial visits, meet-and-greets and signature leadership gatherings.

✦

Collaborative Growth

Engage in peer learning, partnerships and discussions with like-minded leaders driving change.

Signature Engagements

Where leaders gather

From flagship conclaves to immersive industry exposure — moments that turn members into a movement.

Flagship Event
Women Directors' Conclave 2025

Women Shaping Viksit Bhaarat

The 4th edition — "Directors of Transformation" — brought together eminent women directors, governance leaders and changemakers, hosted in partnership with NSE.

4th EditionVenue Partner: NSEDirectors of Transformation
Industrial Visit 2026

Inside the factory floor

An exclusive industry-exposure initiative — members visited Ami Polymer Pvt. Ltd. for operational insights, leadership interactions and on-ground organisational learning.

Values that bind us

Membership Criteria

Is WOMB Circle for you?

WOMB Circle is curated for women already serving on Boards or in influential leadership positions. Membership is by application.

Join WOMB Circle → Have Questions?
